title: U54 SCENT 10X Genomics Visium Protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"e9vav","text":"This document outlines the 10X Genomics Visium Protocol used for normal lung and colon tissues for SCENT at Duke University. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Once slides received, the following 10x Genomics protocol is followed: https://cdn.10xgenomics.com/image/upload/v1660261285/support-documents/CG000409_Demonstrated_Protocol_VisiumSpatialFFPE_Deparaffin_H_E_RevC.pdf https://cdn.10xgenomics.com/image/upload/v1660261285/support-documents/CG000407_VisiumSpatialGeneExpressionforFFPE_UserGuide_RevD.pdf
10x Genomics kit is used – Visium (v1) Spatial for FFPE Gene Expression Kit, Human Transcriptome.
Libraries sequenced on Illumina sequencers to a read depth of a least 25k reads/spot, with read lengths of 28x10x10x50.
creator: Valerie Bekker
